examples.title: Free Space Bitmap Allocation
examples.code:
FUNCTION allocate_block():
    FOR i FROM 0 TO bitmap_size:
        IF bitmap[i] == 0:
            bitmap[i] = 1
            RETURN block_address[i]
    RETURN -1 // No free blocks
examples.explanation: Scans bitmap for first free block, marks it used

examples.title: Linked List Allocation Traversal
examples.explanation: Linked list traversal for sequential file access
